UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, ANNA WONG, JENNY QUAN, NU AKA DU QUAN AKA JIMMY QUAN $18,305.40 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,027.05 INTEREST, $226.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,218.45

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANTS ANNA WONG, JENNY WONG, AND NU QUAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. CCP SECTION 473(D) PROVIDES NO RELIEF BECAUSE THE EVIDENCE SHOWS PROPER SERVICE CONSTRUING THE MOTION IS ONE UNDER SECTION 473.5; IT IS UNTIMELY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J.
